rulings.Case Title: KEVIN STUCKART et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Mia Mattis In Support Thereof; (Proposed) Order
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, MAY 06, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 1. Plaintiff¿s motion for leave to file a second amended complaint is granted. No opposition filed. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, MAY 06, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 2. Defendant Quintec Industries¿s motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution is granted. No opposition filed. The complaint was filed in 2002, over 5 years ago. A hearing is required unless defendant¿s counsel advises the plaintiff of the tentative ruling and the plaintiff states that he does not wish to contest the tentative ruling. = (220/HEK)
